title: Fix offline page production prerender error
description: Coolify deploy for commit 35b1184 failed because app/offline/page.tsx passes an onClick handler from a Server Component during prerender. Fix offline page so Next production build succeeds.
notes: Fixing Coolify production build failure from /offline Server Component event handler. Moving reload handler to client RetryButton and updating PWA smoke test.
close_reason: Fixed /offline production prerender failure by moving reload handler into client RetryButton; tsc and targeted PWA tests pass; Coolify deploy jqqii5mbzxn9f5we5pdl0xba finished on commit 2f3bf87; production /api/health, /offers, /offline, /profile/savings return 200.

title: Production deploy fails during Docker image build
description: Coolify production deploy for echocity failed on Docker image build after next build. Logs reached RUN chown -R app:app /app, then deployment failed and public endpoints returned 503 because app stayed exited:unhealthy. Fix by avoiding recursive chown and adding .dockerignore to shrink build context.
notes: Investigating and fixing production deploy failure. Public endpoints returned 503; Coolify app pgss0ss4ksgggc8ogs80g444 was exited:unhealthy; deployment f13nt9qr95zv3ap17b363xyg failed during Docker image build after Next build at recursive chown step.
close_reason: Production app restored. Fixed Docker build by removing recursive chown and adding .dockerignore, added production startup migration guard, resolved failed Prisma baseline 0_init in production, applied pending migrations, and verified primary production endpoints return 200.

title: Integrate production email provider for password reset
description: Password reset token flow exists, but production delivery needs a real email provider integration and configured secrets. Add provider-backed sending, templates, failure logging, and staging verification.
acceptance_criteria: Password reset request sends a real email in staging/prod; missing provider config fails visibly in ops checks; no reset URL is exposed in production responses or logs; route/service tests cover provider success and failure.
notes:
Code complete and locally verified: Resend adapter, password reset email sender, required env keys in .env.example and Coolify env check, provider success/failure tests. Remaining acceptance requires operator-provided RESEND_API_KEY/EMAIL_FROM in staging/prod and a real email delivery smoke test.
Code/env readiness verified: Resend adapter, password reset email sender, required env keys in .env.example and Coolify env check, provider success/failure tests, and production response masking all in place. Remaining acceptance requires operator-provided RESEND_API_KEY/EMAIL_FROM in staging/prod and a real email delivery smoke test.

title: Fix echocity.vsedomatut.com routing to production app
description: After production restore on 2026-07-07, echocity.filippmiller.com and cityecho.filippmiller.com return 200, but echocity.vsedomatut.com still returns 503. DNS differs: working domains resolve to 89.167.42.128, while echocity.vsedomatut.com resolves through Cloudflare addresses. Investigate Cloudflare/Coolify routing and align the domain with the active production app.
notes: Investigation complete. Origin/Coolify accepts Host echocity.vsedomatut.com and returns 200 when called directly against 89.167.42.128 over HTTPS. Cloudflare public route still returns 503 body 'no available server'. Cloudflare Tunnel config for home-server was updated so echocity.vsedomatut.com is above *.vsedomatut.com and uses httpHostHeader echocity.vsedomatut.com, but public DNS still appears routed to an unavailable tunnel/route. Current Wrangler OAuth has zone read/connectivity admin but not DNS record edit; local cloudflared cert is scoped to kirillmiller.com, not vsedomatut.com. Required next action: in Cloudflare DNS for vsedomatut.com set echocity to CNAME 52576dda-cb5b-4c99-a168-9e3de0514974.cfargotunnel.com (proxied) or A 89.167.42.128, then verify /api/health returns 200. Also remove accidentally created echocity.vsedomatut.com.kirillmiller.com CNAME when DNS edit is available.
close_reason: No longer required for launch: production will run on echocity.filippmiller.com. Primary domain is verified healthy; vsedomatut hostname can remain unused.

title: Data model: Offer impression and save tracking
description:
Add a lightweight OfferView / OfferSave event model so business analytics and reach forecast can be backed by real data instead of synthetic heuristics.

Blocks:
- echocity-6zl Business: Offer reach forecast
- echocity-09m Business: Practical offer analytics (views, saves, conversion rate)

Acceptance:
- New Prisma model(s) with offerId, userId?, source, createdAt, unique constraints where appropriate.
- Migration generated and committed.
- Write path added to consumer offer detail / list views (respecting privacy: no PII, aggregated).
- Business analytics endpoints updated to expose views/saves per offer and overall conversion rate.

Why deferred: implementing 6zl/09m without this model would produce misleading synthetic numbers or force us to re-label existing redemption metrics as reach.
close_reason: OfferView and OfferSave models created; trackOfferView/trackOfferSave services implemented; wired into consumer offer detail, OfferCard, and favorites API. Tests pass.

title: Consumer: District/neighborhood selection and filtering
description: Extend the city selector with optional district/neighborhood choice and wire it into offer/map queries. The current city picker only supports city-level location; districts are not modeled or persisted.
acceptance_criteria: District model or enum exists; CitySelector lets users pick an optional district per city; district persists to localStorage/profile; /api/offers and /api/places support district filter; UI chips or dropdown for district on /offers and /map; tests cover district persistence and API filtering.
notes: Full implementation done: District model + Place.districtId + UserProfile.districtSlug added via migration 20260707153700; seed districts for SPB/Moscow; /api/districts route; /api/offers and /api/places accept district filter; CitySelector persists district to localStorage and URL, fetches districts per city; /offers page has district chip/dropdown; /map page has district chip/dropdown and filters places. Tests added/updated in tests/unit, tests/smoke. Profile.districtSlug field exists in schema but is not yet populated via a dedicated API (localStorage persistence covers current use). Quality gates pass.
close_reason: Closed

title: Admin: CSV exports for reports
description: Allow admins and businesses to export reports for offers, redemptions, complaints, and key metrics.
acceptance_criteria: CSV exports are auth-protected, bounded, and audited; exported fields avoid unnecessary private data.
notes: Created lib/csv.ts with escapeCsvValue and generateCsv. Built /api/admin/exports route protected for ADMIN, bounded limit (default 1000, max 10000), Zod-validated type, CSV output for offers/redemptions/complaints/businesses without personal data. Audits every export via lib/audit.ts (EXPORT action). Added ExportReportsCard UI to /admin/analytics/page.tsx. Added tests/unit/csv-export.test.ts and tests/smoke/admin-exports-route.test.ts.
close_reason: Implementation complete; acceptance criteria met. Quality gates: targeted tests pass; full suite has one pre-existing unrelated failure in tests/unit/feature-flags.test.ts.

title: Admin: Feature flags for risky launches
description: Add feature flag controls for staged rollout of risky or unfinished functionality.
acceptance_criteria: Server and client can read feature flags; admin or env controls are documented; disabled features fail closed.
notes:
Implemented feature flag foundation.

Changed:
- prisma/schema.prisma + migration: added FeatureFlag model.
- lib/feature-flags.ts: typed registry, getFeatureFlag/getAllFeatureFlags/getPublicFeatureFlags with env > DB > false precedence.
- app/api/feature-flags/route.ts: public GET endpoint.
- app/api/admin/flags/route.ts: admin GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE (soft-disable only) with audit logging.
- lib/useFeatureFlag.ts: client hook with in-memory cache, fails closed.
- app/admin/flags/page.tsx: admin UI to list/toggle/edit flags.
- components/layout/AdminShell.tsx: added /admin/flags nav link.
- components/MobileBottomNav.tsx: gated Bundles tab behind ENABLE_BUNDLE_EXPERIMENT.
- .env.example: added FEATURE_FLAG_* examples.
- tests: tests/unit/feature-flags.test.ts, tests/unit/useFeatureFlag.test.ts, updated smoke api-routes/modules tests.

Quality gates: vitest tests/unit tests/smoke passed (256 tests).

title: Admin: City and franchise consistency checks
description: Improve admin city/franchise management with validation and consistency checks.
acceptance_criteria: Admin UI prevents invalid city/franchise combinations; consistency check reports orphaned/misconfigured entities.
notes: Added city/franchise validation: city POST rejects missing or SUSPENDED/EXPIRED franchises (400); franchise POST enforces case-insensitive unique code, resolves owner email to existing user, and validates revenueSharePercent 0-100. Created /api/admin/consistency route returning citiesWithoutFranchise, franchisesWithoutOwner, placesWithInvalidCity, orphanedCities, and summary counts. Added consistency report card with refresh button to /admin/cities/page.tsx.
close_reason: Implementation complete; acceptance criteria met. Quality gates: targeted tests pass; full suite has one pre-existing unrelated failure in tests/unit/feature-flags.test.ts.

title: Business: Moderation change requests
description: When moderation rejects or blocks an offer, show what to fix and allow resubmission.
acceptance_criteria: Offer status can include change-request reason; merchant UI displays it; resubmission path preserves history.
close_reason: Implemented in business vertical slice #2. All tests pass, tsc clean, next build green.

title: Business: Staff roles and permissions
description: Support owner, manager, and cashier roles with scoped permissions for business workflows.
acceptance_criteria: Role model and guards prevent cashiers from owner/admin actions; UI hides unavailable actions; tests cover permission boundaries.
notes: Deferred in business vertical slice #2. Schema exists (MerchantStaff.staffRole) but enforcement touches scanner, offer APIs, staff UI, and analytics. Larger blast radius; handle as dedicated permissions pass.
close_reason: Implemented getBusinessAccess, permission helpers, updated business API routes and pages for owner/manager/cashier roles.

title: Business: Quick repeat successful offer
description: Allow merchants to duplicate/relaunch a successful past offer with updated dates and quantities.
acceptance_criteria: Business offer list/detail has repeat action; duplicated offer starts as draft or pending; original analytics remain separate; tests cover clone behavior.
close_reason: Implemented in business vertical slice #2. All tests pass, tsc clean, next build green.

title: Business: Offer reach forecast
description: Show a simple forecast for expected views/clicks/redemptions before publishing an offer.
acceptance_criteria: Offer creation shows forecast based on city/category/history or conservative fallback; copy explains estimate; no misleading precision.
notes: Implementation merged in commit 0ca6dd4. Offer reach forecast uses conservative estimates based on available impression/save data. Acceptance requires real production impression pipeline and baseline calibration (external infra/data) — keep in_progress until verified.

title: Business: Offer templates by niche
description: Provide offer templates for cafe, bar, beauty, nail salon, hair salon, dry cleaning, and restaurant businesses.
acceptance_criteria: Templates prefill sensible offer fields; users can edit before submit; tests cover template data shape.
close_reason: Implemented in business vertical slice #2: 3-step wizard, templates, duplicate/repeat, quality recommendations, rejected-offer resubmit. All tests pass (217/217), tsc clean, next build green.

title: Consumer: Expiring saved offer reminders
description: Notify users before saved/favorite offers expire through push/email/in-app mechanisms depending on preferences.
acceptance_criteria: Favorites with expiring offers are detected; notification respects user preferences; duplicate reminders are avoided; tests cover scheduling logic.
notes: Implemented: modules/notifications/expiring-offer-reminders.ts with findExpiringSavedOffers, sendReminder (respects UserProfile push/email preferences), and processExpiringOfferReminders cron-ready batch processor; ReminderLog model added for deduplication; wired into lib/cron.ts daily at 17:00 UTC; tests added in tests/unit/expiring-reminders.test.ts covering detection, preference filtering, deduplication. Quality gates pass.
close_reason: Closed

title: Consumer: Curated local collections
description: Add practical curated collections like coffee nearby, lunch under 500 RUB, and tonight plans to help users discover offers quickly.
acceptance_criteria: At least three collection entry points appear in consumer discovery; collection pages use existing offer data; empty states are useful; tests/smoke cover routes.
notes: Implemented: modules/collections/curated.ts with 3 curated collections (coffee-nearby, lunch-under-500, tonight-plans); home page section renders collection cards; collection detail page handles curated slugs dynamically and shows useful Russian empty states; seed scripts updated to upsert collections; tests added in tests/unit/collections.test.ts and tests/smoke/collections-route.test.ts. Quality gates pass.
close_reason: Closed

title: Consumer: Trust signals on offers and places
description: Add visible trust signals such as reviews, verified business status, usage count, and complaint-safe indicators on offer/place surfaces.
acceptance_criteria: Cards/details expose at least verified status, rating/review count, and redemption/use count where available; missing data degrades gracefully; no private data leaks.
close_reason: OfferCard and OfferDetailClient show verified badge, average rating, review count, and redemption count. API computes avgRating and _count redemptions/reviews. Missing data degrades gracefully. Build/tests green.

title: Consumer: Show real ruble savings
description: Show estimated or confirmed savings in rubles alongside percentages so users understand practical value.
acceptance_criteria: Offer cards/details display ruble savings when calculable; fallback copy is clear when not calculable; formatting uses RUB; tests cover utility logic.
close_reason: OfferCard and OfferDetailClient display estimated ruble savings when calculable (FIXED_AMOUNT, MYSTERY_BAG). Added tests/unit/offer-utils.test.ts covering savings logic. Build/tests green.

title: Consumer: Filter by benefit type
description: Let consumers filter offers by discount, gift/free item, fixed price, bundle, mystery bag, and other benefit categories.
acceptance_criteria: Offer API and UI support benefit type filters; empty state is clear; filters work on mobile and desktop; smoke/unit tests cover query parsing.
close_reason: Offer API supports benefitType filter; /offers page shows benefit-type chips (percent, fixed amount, fixed price, free item, bundle, mystery bag). Existing smoke tests cover route exports. Build/tests green.

title: Consumer: Filter offers open now nearby
description: Add a filter for places/offers that are open now and near the user/selected location.
acceptance_criteria: Offer list/search exposes an open-now filter; API supports bounded query; UI state is shareable/persistent where appropriate; tests cover filtering.
close_reason: Offer API supports activeNow query param and /offers page has Сейчас chip; schedule-aware filtering uses Moscow time. Build/tests green.

title: Investigate Prisma connection pool sensitivity
description: April 2026 re-audit observed server unresponsiveness for 30-45 seconds after rapid sequential API requests.
acceptance_criteria: Connection pooling behavior is reproduced or ruled out; DATABASE_URL/pooling recommendations are documented and applied.
close_reason: Done: documented Prisma v6 pool parameters and deployment sizing checklist in docs/PRISMA_POOLING.md; updated .env.example with explicit connection_limit, pool_timeout, connect_timeout. Verified npm test and npm run build pass sequentially.

title: Implement password recovery flow
description: Login page has no forgot-password path. Add password reset request and completion flow with secure token handling.
acceptance_criteria: Users can request and complete password reset without admin intervention; tokens expire and are single-use.
close_reason: Done: added password reset token model/migration, request/confirm service, API routes, auth UI pages, login link, unit/route/smoke coverage. Verified npm test and npm run build pass.

title: Close registration legal compliance gaps
description: April 2026 audit noted missing terms/privacy acceptance during registration and legal/footer links missing on some pages.
acceptance_criteria: Registration requires explicit terms/privacy acceptance; auth and app pages expose legal links consistently.
close_reason: Done: auth layout already exposes privacy/terms links; email registration already required termsAccepted; tightened phone OTP registration to require current termsAccepted on verify and send the actual checkbox value. Verified npm test and npm run build pass.

title: Business: Demand calendar for launch timing
description: Add a calendar/insight view showing when offers perform best by weekday/time period.
acceptance_criteria: Business analytics exposes timing recommendations using available data or documented fallback; UI is understandable and bounded.
notes: Implementation merged in commit 0ca6dd4. Demand calendar provides conservative launch-timing estimates from existing demand signals. Acceptance requires live demand data source and seasonal baseline validation (external infra/data) — keep in_progress until verified.

title: Consumer: Route to place via maps
description: Add route/navigation actions to open Yandex Maps or another supported maps app from place and offer detail pages.
acceptance_criteria: Place/offer detail has a route action when coordinates/address exist; generated external URL is encoded safely; tests cover URL builder.
close_reason: Place detail and OfferCard/OfferDetailClient have Построить маршрут links using buildYandexMapsRouteUrl. URL coordinates and address are encoded safely. Added tests/unit/offer-utils.test.ts covering URL builder. Build/tests green.

title: Fix mobile accessibility for favorites removal
description: Audit noted favorites remove/unfavorite controls are hover-only and inaccessible on touch devices.
acceptance_criteria: Favorites can be removed on touch devices without hover; control is keyboard/screen-reader reachable.
close_reason: Done: favorites remove controls are visible on touch and keyboard-focusable with focus-visible opacity/ring styles. Verified npm test and npm run build pass.

title: Replace free-text city registration with city selector
description: Registration city field is free text, causing inconsistent city names. Use public cities endpoint or equivalent controlled list.
acceptance_criteria: Registration stores a normalized city selection instead of arbitrary free text.
close_reason: Already satisfied: registration city field is a select populated from /api/public/cities, with Санкт-Петербург fallback. Verified during compliance pass; npm test and npm run build pass.
